content.cn_text: 你将听到语言中心图书馆的馆长向一些新生解释图书馆的设施。
content.en_text: You will hear the director of a language-centre library explaining about its facilities to some new students.

content.cn_text: 欢迎来到图书馆或国际图书馆。它的意思是独立学习中心，让我来解释一下它的一些设施。
content.en_text: Welcome to the library, or the I.L.C.. which means Independent Learning Centre, and let me explain about some of its facilities.

content.cn_text: 我们现在就站在入口处，借阅台旁边。
content.en_text: We're standing here at the entry gales, next to the borrowing desk.

content.cn_text: 那是你借书的地方，但我们也建议你在这里的图书馆学习，因为我们的大部分资料都不能借。
content.en_text: That's where you check out any books, but you are also advised to study in the library here, since most of our material cannot be borrowed.

content.cn_text: 因此，我们沿着图书馆的中间设置了座位，在我们前面的那个角落里。
content.en_text: Thus, we have Seating along the middle of the library, and in that far corner in front of us.

content.cn_text: 在左边，我们有安静阅读区，用于一些严肃的阅读活动。
content.en_text: on the left, we have the Quiet Reading Section, for some serious reading activity.

content.cn_text: 我们以前把电脑放在那里，但后来意识到那个角落非常安静，因此更适合它现在的用途。
content.en_text: We used to have the computers there but then realised that that corner was very quiet,and thus better suited for the purpose it now has.

content.cn_text: 电脑被转移到了更中心的位置，就在我们身边，在左边。
content.en_text: The computers were instead shifled to a more central location, right beside us here, on the left.

content.cn_text: 再一次，有点令人困惑的是，这个区域曾经是报纸和杂志区，但是安静阅读区的人们必须走很远的路才能收集这些文献，所以它被移到了他们旁边，在相邻的角落里。
content.en_text: Again, somewhat confusingly, this area once housed the Newspaper and Magazine Section, but the people in the Quiet Reading Area had to walk loo far to collect this literature, so it was moved to right beside them, in the adjacent corner.

content.cn_text: 所以，请随意阅读那里的报纸。
content.en_text: So, feel free to read the newspapers there.

content.cn_text: 但是参考书，那些又大又沉的字典、地图册和百科全书，都放在大楼的另一端，靠墙的地方。这是因为它们通常不那么受欢迎，我们想要更多的空间来放置杂志架，杂志架一直是读者的最爱。
content.en_text: But the reference books, those huge weighty dictionaries, atlases, and encyclopedias, were all situated at the opposite end of the building, against the wall.This was because they weren't generally that popular, and we wanted more space for the magazine racks, always a favourite with readers.

content.cn_text: 好的，除了阅读，你们还需要提高听力技能，为此你们需要音频部分。
content.en_text: Okay, as well as reading, you need to work on your listening skills, and for that you need the Audio Section.

content.cn_text: 再说一遍，这样的活动需要一个安静的地方，所以我们把它放在最后一个角落里，就在你们的右边，正如你们所看到的。
content.en_text: Again, such an activity needs a quiet area, so we put this in the last remaining corner, up there on your right, as you can see.

content.cn_text: 那里有CD播放器和耳机，所以只要借一下听音包，坐在那里就可以听了。
content.en_text: There are CD players and headphones, so just borrow the listening packs, sit down there, and listen away.

content.cn_text: 好了，只剩下主库了。
content.en_text: Right, that just leaves the main library.

content.cn_text: 在其他图书馆里，它通常就在报纸和杂志区旁边，可以自由选择所有类型的文学作品，但在这里，我们把它们分开得更远。
content.en_text: In other libraries, that's often right beside the Newspaper and Magazine Section, allowing freedom to choose from all genres of literature, but here, we've got them further apart.

content.cn_text: 至于主图书馆，只要顺着鼻子走，经过那里的中央设置，它就在所有书架中间，在那里你会发现大量有趣的挂钩和听力包。
content.en_text: For the main library, just follow your nose, past the central settling there, and it's there among all that shelving, upon which you'll find an abundance of interesting hooks and listening packs to use.

content.cn_text: 现在，我想再给你们介绍一下国际商会提供的一项优质服务
content.en_text: Now, I'd like to tell you a bit more about an excellent service offered in the I.L.C.

content.cn_text: 我们称之为“特别会议”。
content.en_text: here that we call the 'Special Sessions'.

content.cn_text: 你能在里面做什么?
content.en_text: What can you do in them?

content.cn_text: 首先，你们中的许多人需要
content.en_text: For a start, many of you need

content.cn_text: 练习说英语。
content.en_text: practice in speaking English.

content.cn_text: 为此，我们举行了一个特别的讨论会，由一位老师领导。
content.en_text: and for that we hold a special Discussion Session, led by a teacher.

content.cn_text: 那可能很吵，事实上，我们希望它很吵，因为那意味着很多人在说话。
content.en_text: That can be noisy, in fact, we hope that it is noisy, since that would mean many people are talking.

content.cn_text: 它在中央座位区，以前是10:30到1:30。但我们发现噪音打扰了I.L.C的老主客，所以我们缩短了讨论时间，把讨论改到了早上9点的时段，那时市中心的人比较少。
content.en_text: It's in the Central Seating area, and it used to be from 10.30 to 1.30.but we found that the noise was disturbing the regular I.L.C patrons, so we shortened and moved this discussion to the morning, 9.00 am time slot, when fewer people tire in the centre.

content.cn_text: 它持续一个半小时。
content.en_text: It goes for one and a half hours.

content.cn_text: 好吧，那写作技巧呢?
content.en_text: Alright, what about Writing Skills?

content.cn_text: 我们可以帮你找另一位老师。
content.en_text: Well, we can help you there with another teacher.

content.cn_text: 现在，写作是一项相当安静的活动，所以老师会把他或她自己放在安静阅读区，从1点半到3点。
content.en_text: Now, writing is a fairly quiet activity, so that teacher stations him or herself in the Quiet Reading area from 1.30 until three.

content.cn_text: 上午10:30到中午这段时间不能有老师教这种写作技巧，因为他们都在上午上课。
content.en_text: The 10.30-to-midday time slot cannot have a teacher for such writing skills, as they are all teaching in the morning.

content.cn_text: 出于这个原因，当然，早上也不可能有一个随叫随到的老师，尽管许多人希望有一个，特别是10点半到中午的人群，刚刚结束了他们的早课。
content.en_text: For this reason, of course, there cannot be an on-call teacher in the morning either, although many people would like one, particularly the 10.30-to-noon crowd, having just finished their early morning class.

content.cn_text: 这些学生都必须等到中午以后，在三个小时的时间里，一名老师将驻扎在音频科，准备好处理所有这些问题。
content.en_text: These students all have to wait until midday onwards, when, for three hours,a teacher will be stationed in the Audio Section, ready to deal with all those questions.

content.cn_text: 直到最近，我们还有另一位老师负责下午3点到6点的时段，在中央结算中心，但所有的噪音都干扰了国际语言中心的晚使用者，所以我们不得不取消了。
content.en_text: Until recently, we had another teacher doing the 3-pm-to-6-pm time slot, in the Central Settling, but all the noise interfered with the late users of the I.L.C., so we had to cancel that.

content.cn_text: 同样嘈杂的还有语言交换，想要学习你的语言的当地学生可以帮助你练习英语。
content.en_text: Also noisy can be the Language Exchange, where local students who want to learn your language will help you practise English.

content.cn_text: 这通常是成对进行的，所以噪音水平足够低，不需要在上午9点进行这种交换，而是在10:30这个更合适的时间，在中央座位之间。
content.en_text: This is generally done in pairs, so the noise level is low enough not to need this exchange lo run at 9 am, but at a more congenial time of 10.30, among the Central Seating.

content.cn_text: 但这必须在1点30分之前结束，然后进行更安静、更个性化的活动。
content.en_text: That must finish by 1.30 though, tiller which quieter and more individual activities take place.

groups.desc:
Questions 11-16
Label the floor plan.
Write the correct letter, A-F, for each answer.

items.title: Quiet reading
items.analysis: 因为听力原文明确提到“Quiet Reading Section”在“far corner in front of us, on the left”，而在图示中，A区域正好符合这个描述。所以，第11题的正确答案是A。

items.title: Computers
items.analysis: 这道题的正确答案是E。听力原文中提到“computers were instead shifted to a more central location, right beside us here, on the left”，结合图示，E区域位于入口左边的中央位置，符合描述。定位词是“Computers”，信号词是“shifted”、“central location”、“beside us”和“on the left”。这些信号词帮助我们确定了计算机的位置在入口左边的中央区域。其他选项如A和B虽然也在入口附近，但不符合“on the left”的描述，因此不正确。

items.title: Newspapers & magazines
items.analysis: 文中提到“this area once housed the Newspaper and Magazine Section”，但由于人们从安静阅读区到这个区域的距离太远，所以报纸和杂志区被搬到了安静阅读区旁边的角落。因此，D选项是正确的，因为D位置在安静阅读区旁边，符合文中描述的搬迁后的报纸和杂志区位置。

items.title: Reference books
items.analysis: 因为文中提到参考书籍（reference books）的位置在建筑物的最远端（opposite end），靠墙（against the wall）。在图示中，唯一符合这些描述的区域是F，因此第14题的正确答案是F。

items.title: Audio section
items.analysis: 因为文中提到“Audio section”在右边的最后一个角落，并且这个区域有CD播放机和耳机。这些描述都指向地图上的C区域，所以正确答案是C。其他选项如E和F虽然在右边，但没有提到相关的设施，因此是错误的。

items.title: Main library
items.analysis: 文中提到“main library”在“central seating”之后，并且有很多“shelving”（书架）。结合图示，B区域有多个书架（shelving），符合描述，因此正确答案是B。其他选项如D区域虽然也有座位和书架，但没有明确提到是主图书馆。C区域则是报纸和杂志区，不符合题意。

groups.desc:
Questions 17-20
Complete the timetable.
Write the correct letter,A-J, for each answer.

items.title: Teacher-led discussion
items.analysis: 文中提到的讨论会从10:30到1:30改到了早上9:00开始，并且在Central Seating area举行。这与题干中的信息完全吻合，因此答案是E。

items.title: Writing skills
items.analysis: 因为听力原文明确提到写作活动在1.30到3.00之间进行，并且地点是在Quiet Reading区域，所以答案是C。

items.title: On-call teacher
items.analysis: 题目问的是中午到1:30之间的活动，原文明确提到中午以后会有一位老师在音频区回答问题，且持续三个小时，因此这个时间段在音频区的活动是正确答案。

items.title: Language exchange
items.analysis: 因为听力原文明确提到“Language Exchange”在“10.30到1.30”之间进行，并且地点是在“Central Seating”。所以10.30到12.00在Central Seating进行的活动是Language Exchange。
